svg.title: Aswath's terminal-style GitHub profile

svg.text: . Focus ................. Applied AI + data systems. Building .............. useful, human-centered software. Languages.Code ....... Python, TypeScript, JavaScript. Languages.Web ........ HTML, CSS, JSON. Tools ................. Jupyter, Git, GitHub
